Jordan has maintained a neutral stance in the Gaza conflict. While opposing Israeli aggression and sending humanitarian aid to Gaza, it also intercepted Iranian missiles to protect its own sovereignty—not to defend Israel. Jordan neither supports Hamas nor Iran militarily and aims to stay out of regional escalation.
